title: Genesis Framework
description: A framework for creating custom age progression systems.
body:
## About

Genesis Framework is a mod that empowers mod pack creators, server admins, and modders with a data-driven means to create dynamic age progression systems. These age progression systems are based on Advancements. Completing the Advancements unlocks different items, blocks, and even dimensions. Age progression is linear and can be used to add more friction to the vanilla progression system.

The mod also introduces a new instruction system that can be used to guide players through your new age progression system or to guide them through other gameplay features in your mod pack, world, or server.

For details on how to use the Genesis Framework, [please refer to the wiki](https://github.com/marianyp/Genesis-Framework/wiki).

## Mods Built on Genesis Framework

- [Genesis](https://modrinth.com/mod/genesis-official)
